name: Attention Tokens — devnet has no bonding curves; page shows honest empty state

planSteps.description: Wait up to 15 seconds for the page to render and any market data queries to complete
The page renders without crashing, without an error boundary, without a blank white screen, and without a raw JavaScript stack trace visible to the user

If the attention token market is empty on devnet (as documented in the project's README), the page must either (a) show a clear empty-state message like 'No alliance tokens launched yet — bonding curves ship on Solana mainnet', or (b) show explicit demo/placeholder data with a visible label indicating it is demo data. The page must NOT silently show blank cards, undefined values, NaN, 'null', or fabricated market prices without a demo-data indicator.
